meaning: n.[蛹望閨皮抜闍ｯ閭ｺ,莠檎抜蝓ｺ莠梧ｰｨ蝓ｺ閨碑怯
examples: Methods To detect the sed occult blood of 200 specimens with both ortho-tolidine method and immunogold method. then analyse the results.
The residual chlorine variation in cooling water discharged from the Shidongkou Thermal Power Plant was measured by means of o-tolidine colorimetry.
In this paper, benzidine, C-tolidine and benzidine hydrochloride are determined by anodic differential pulse voltammetry on a glassy-carbon electrode.
